smg.text: Mainly cloudy. A few showers. Possible thunderstorms. Force 3 to 4 east to northeasterly winds.
Mainly cloudy. Occasional showers. A few thunderstorms. Force 2 to 4 southeasterly winds with gusts.
Mainly cloudy. Occasional showers. A few thunderstorms. Force 3 to 5 south to southwesterly winds with gusts.
Cloudy. Showers, heavy at times. Occasional thunderstorms. Force 4 to 5 southwesterly winds with gusts.
Cloudy. Showers, heavy at times. Occasional thunderstorms. Force 3 to 4 southwesterly winds, occasionally force 5 with gusts.
Cloudy. Showers, heavy at first. Occasional thunderstorms. Force 3 to 4 southwesterly winds, occasionally force 5 with gusts.
Cloudy. Occasional Thundery showers. Force 3 to 4 south to southwesterly winds with gusts.
